data.title: PixVerse Updates R1 Real-time World Model with Shared Worlds and Personalized Avatars
data.description: PixVerse revealed a significant advancement in its real-time world model, R1. Introduced in January 2026 as the pioneering real-time world model globally, R1 transformed video content from static to interactive, allowing instant response to user interactions. The recent update enhances this concept further by enabling users to generate a digital version of themselves, incorporate it into the newly produced world, and live-share this experience with others in real time.

data.title: Anti-union advocates cheer setbacks at Wells Fargo
data.description: Supporters of right-to-work policies are hailing the recent defeats of unions at Wells Fargo as a signal that the surge in interest for organized labor during the Biden administration has come to an end.

data.title: Vancity reports strong 2025 performance. Asset levels reach a record $41 billion
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Vancouver, on the territories of Musqueam, Squamish, and Tsleil-Waututh Nations, Vancity announced its 2025 financial results. The report showcased robust profitability, revealing a historic milestone of $41 billion in assets alongside assets under administration. As the leading financial institution in British Columbia, Vancity is starting 2026 with a positive outlook, emphasizing sustained impact, expansion, and enhancing member experience.

data.title: Arctech Flagship SkyLine II: New Features Unlock Complex Solar Project Potential
data.description: In Kunshan, China, on April 3, 2026, the shift in photovoltaic development towards challenging terrains such as mountains, hills, and slopes is becoming more prevalent due to a shortage of premium land. Traditional tracking systems are encountering difficulties in adapting to such terrains, leading to increased site preparation costs and decreased efficiency.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation stakes nearly $93M worth of ETH, nearing 70,000 ETH strategic target to boost proof-of-stake setup.
data.description: The recent deposits have brought the Foundation within reach of its strategic staking goal of 70,000 ETH, further strengthening Ethereum's proof-of-stake ecosystem.

data.title: The Fiber Weave Skew Problem Is Over: ACCM Celeritas™ SF1600 Delivers Zero-Skew for PCIe 7, 224 Gbps and Beyond
data.description: In San Jose, California, Advanced Chip & Circuit Materials, Inc. (ACCM) unveiled the Celeritas SF1600. This new laminate and prepreg material is designed to address the issue of fiber weave skew by targeting the root cause. Fiber weave skew, a materials challenge, occurs when woven glass in a laminate creates spatially periodic variations in dielectric properties. This causes differential pairs of conductors to follow different paths through resin-rich and glass-rich areas, leading to time delays. The Celeritas SF1600 aims to eliminate this problem in electronic circuits.

data.title: SouthState Bank Corporation to Announce Quarterly Earnings Results on Thursday, April 23, 2026
data.description: Winter Haven, Florida - On April 3, 2026, SouthState Bank Corporation (NYSE: SSB) disclosed its plans to unveil its first quarter 2026 earnings on April 23, 2026. The announcement will come after market hours, and interested investors will be able to review the results following the release.
